prompt: A vertical editorial-style travel poster in Spanish for a III viaje fotográfico titled “OTOÑO EN NUEVA YORK,” designed with a sophisticated urban autumn mood and a premium photography-workshop aesthetic. Use a tall mobile-friendly poster layout with a warm off-white, beige, charcoal, and burnt orange palette. The composition is dominated by oversized condensed black sans-serif typography on the left: small text at the top reading “III VIAJE FOTOGRÁFICO,” then the huge stacked headline “OTOÑO” on top, a smaller “EN” with short horizontal orange lines on both sides, and below it the huge stacked words “NUEVA YORK.” On the right side, place a narrow informational column with exactly 4 short benefit lines in uppercase: “7 NOCHES”, “GRUPO REDUCIDO”, “GUÍAS EXPERTOS”, and “MILES DE FOTOS” with the last line in orange. Below that, add the dates in large orange numbers “17-24” and beneath in black uppercase “DE OCTUBRE” and “DE 2026.” Add a thin vertical line near the far right edge and a tiny orange dot at the top. Integrate a moody New York street photo collage into the lower half and through the typography, centered on the Manhattan Bridge framed by dark brick buildings, wet streets, a few cars, steam rising from the roadway, and a lone photographer seen from behind in the foreground wearing a rust-orange beanie and a backpack, holding a camera toward the bridge. Let giant cropped letterforms from “NYC” or similarly bold graphic shapes blend with the city imagery across the bottom half, creating a layered double-exposure poster effect. Add distressed paper textures, rough torn-edge overlays, brushy white paint textures, and subtle grunge for a handcrafted editorial finish. On the left lower-mid area, place a circular orange stamp containing a small Statue of Liberty torch icon and the curved text “III VIAJE FOTOGRÁFICO · OTOÑO EN NUEVA YORK.” Along the bottom, create a dark band with 2 presenter credits, one left and one right, separated by a thin vertical orange line: left “CARLOS SÁNCHEZ” with “@CHOCUTUTS” in orange below, right “JON TARAFA” with “@JONTCPHOTO” in orange below. Centered at the very bottom, add the website “VIAJENY.COM” in spaced orange uppercase letters. Include 2 partially cropped grayscale portrait cutouts in the bottom corners, one on the left and one on the right, blending into the dark footer area. Overall style: cinematic travel advertisement, contemporary magazine poster, bold typographic hierarchy, layered collage, gritty New York autumn atmosphere, high contrast, elegant and dramatic.
